data.title: FOX Sports announces record-breaking 70 matches airing on network television and 40 in primetime for FIFA World Cup 2026™.
data.description: This summer's global event will see a remarkable amount of live first-run programming on FOX Sports platforms, totaling 340 hours. A new record of 70 matches will be featured on network television, with an unprecedented 40 matches scheduled in primetime. Viewers can catch every match streaming live and on-demand in 4K on FOX One.

data.title: Sprout Pharmaceuticals' Addyi named 'Best Prescription for Low Libido' in 2026 Oprah Daily Menopause O-wards for treating pre- and postmenopausal women under 65.
data.description: Sprout Pharmaceuticals revealed that Addyi® has received recognition for being named "Best Prescription for Low Libido" in the 2026 Oprah awards. This recognition comes after Addyi's FDA approval expansion to include treatment for both premenopausal and postmenopausal women under the age of 65. The announcement was made in Raleigh, North Carolina on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Geoforce acquires AssetLink Global to enhance asset tracking, monitoring in tough environments. PLANO, TX, Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: In a move aimed at enhancing solutions for intelligent sensor monitoring and asset tracking in demanding military and industrial settings, a partnership has been formed in Plano, Texas on January 29, 2026. Geoforce, renowned for their rugged and intrinsically safe asset intelligence solutions, has joined forces with another entity. This collaboration will bring together expertise and resources to provide advanced monitoring and tracking capabilities in challenging environments. The partnership signifies a significant step towards bolstering capabilities in this sector and is set to have a notable impact on the industry.

data.title: Innovative Aerosystems to announce first quarter 2026 results on Feb 12, 2026, with a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company known as Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. operating as Innovative Aerosystems revealed that it is scheduled to unveil its first quarter results for the year 2026 before the market opens on Thursday, February 12, 2026. This announcement was made in Exton, Pennsylvania. The Company, traded publicly as ISSC on NASDAQ, will host a conference call on the same day at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. During the call, they plan to discuss the financial results, recent happenings, and engage in a question-and-answer session. Interested parties will be able to access a webcast of the conference call along with the presentation materials.

data.title: Lockheed Martin's Q4 sales reach $20.321 billion with earnings miss, netting $1.344 billion. Total backlog at $194 billion.
data.description: Lockheed Martin Corp. (LMT) reported its Q4 and full year 2025 results with higher revenue year over year but an earnings miss for the quarter. Q4 sales jumped to $20.321 billion from $18.622 billion, with net earnings at $1.344 billion ($5.80/share) compared to $527 million ($2.22/share) in the previous year. Quarterly GAAP EPS missed analyst estimates of $5.86, while revenue beat estimates, reporting $20.321 billion against $19.849 billion expected. Cash from operations rose to $3.219 billion from $1.023 billion, and free cash flow spiked to $2.756 billion from $441 million after a $860 million pension contribution. Aeronautics saw 6% sales growth to $8.524 billion. Missiles and Fire Control recorded an 18% sales rise to $4.020 billion, and Rotary and Mission Systems had an 8% sales increase to $4.616 billion. Space sales were up 8% to $3.161 billion with strong operating profits and margins across the board.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital reports solid financials: robust balance sheet, substantial cash reserves, zero debt. #MarketUpdate
data.description: A new report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.2% in 2021, following a contraction of 3.5% in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Advanced economies are expected to expand by 5.8%, while emerging markets are forecasted to grow by 3.3%. However, the recovery is not equal across regions, with China leading the growth at 8.1% and the Eurozone lagging behind at 4.2%. This uneven recovery poses challenges for worldwide economic stability. In terms of sectors, the service industry is predicted to rebound by 5.2%, while the manufacturing sector is anticipated to grow by 3.9%. The data suggests a gradual economic recovery, but ongoing uncertainties such as vaccine distribution and geopolitical tensions may impact the global economic outlook.

data.title: Middle-income Americans are optimistic about finances, benefit from AI in car buying. Santander US survey: 79% confident in financial prosperity, highest in 3 years.
data.description: In Boston, Santander Holdings USA, Inc. revealed results from its recent study, indicating the resilience and optimism of middle-income Americans amidst ongoing inflation concerns. The Q4 2025 survey highlighted that 79% of respondents believe they are on the right path towards financial prosperity, marking a three-year high in confidence levels. Despite inflation worries, consumers remain positive about their financial futures.

data.title: Francois Leroux appointed VP at Culinary Institute of America, as Chief Guest Experience Officer.
data.description: In a recent announcement from the Culinary Institute of America (CIA) in Hyde Park, N.Y., it was revealed that Francois Leroux has been appointed as the Vice President of Consumer Businesses and Chief Guest Experience Officer. This global leader's new role will involve overseeing consumer-oriented operations within the institute. The appointment, made on January 29, 2026, signifies a strategic move by the CIA to enhance its focus on guest experience and consumer-centric initiatives. Leroux's extensive experience and expertise in consumer businesses are expected to drive growth and innovation in this sector for the renowned institution.

data.title: FirstService Residential adds multiple new active adult communities in Southeast, emphasizing lifestyle-focused approach. Fla. based, expanding portfolio.
data.description: FirstService Residential's recent expansion in Plantation, Florida on January 29, 2026, showcases its focus on a lifestyle-driven strategy and the extensive specialized support it offers for large, amenity-rich communities. As the top property management company in North America, the expansion underscores its commitment to providing unparalleled services and resources to meet the unique needs of its clients. This move signifies the company's dedication to enhancing community living experiences and delivering exceptional results.

data.title: THOR Industries releases 8th annual Sustainability Report, unveiling world's first electric class A motorhome.
data.description: Leading the way in eMobility, THOR Industries, based in ELKHART, Ind., made history on Jan. 29, 2026, by delivering the world's inaugural range-extended electric class A motorhome. With a legacy of over 45 years, the company has consistently prioritized responsible and sustainable business practices in its operations and product development. This milestone solidifies THOR Industries' position as a trailblazer in the industry.
US Factory Orders November Report

data.title: Q2 released 2026 Retail Banking Trends report focusing on competitive advantage in financial services industry.(Note: Character count may vary depending on spaces and formatting)
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:QTWO) revealed the launch of the 2026 Retail Banking Trends and Priorities report. This report provides insights into how banks and credit unions are strategizing for growth and identifies areas of potential competitive advantage. Authored by Jim Marous and published by Digital Banking Report, the report is based on a survey of financial institutions. The survey delves into industry trends and highlights key areas where opportunities for growth and differentiation exist.

data.title: ISG in Stamford launches study on service providers for semiconductor firms adopting tech like digital manufacturing and automation.
data.description: A study on providers aiding semiconductor companies in implementing technologies such as digital manufacturing and intelligent automation has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Connecticut. This research aims to analyze the impact and effectiveness of these providers in the industry.

data.title: Nintendo Download: Kirby Air Riders update allows multi-player support on Switch, including GameShare. Exciting addition for fans.
data.description: This week in Redmond, Washington, Nintendo released an update for Kirby Air Riders, offering GameShare support on Nintendo Switch consoles. Players can now connect over local wireless or online via GameChat, even without the game. Additionally, the update allows for two players per Nintendo Switch system in most online modes. The update enhances gameplay experience for Nintendo Switch users.

data.title: Content Catalyst launches DocuViewer for premium PDF and PowerPoint experience, targeting professionals on-the-go.
data.description: Content Catalyst, a technology partner for market insight publishers based in Cambridge, England, has introduced a new feature called DocuViewer. This feature offers a modern interface that is compatible with mobile devices and allows professionals to access PDF and PowerPoint research content efficiently. Edwin Bailey, the Chief Operating Officer of Content Catalyst, emphasized the need for improved delivery of research insights, stating that traditional PDF readers fall short in this aspect. DocuViewer aims to address this gap and provide professionals with a user-friendly platform for extracting insights across any device.
US Wholesale November Report

data.title: G2 acquiring Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner to create largest B2B software review platform.
data.description: Combining four leading B2B software review platforms will establish a significant online repository of data and software perspectives, enhancing informed purchasing decisions in the AI era. The move, announced on January 29, 2026, in Chicago, will merge top platforms to form the most extensive source of software insights. G2, renowned as the globe's largest and most reliable software marketplace, revealed this collaboration, positioning itself at the forefront of empowering intelligent software procurement.

data.title: Prenosis secures $20M BARDA contract & $20M Series A funding, advancing innovation in critical care diagnostics & therapeutics.
data.description: Prenosis, a cutting-edge technology company focusing on biology-based diagnostics and therapeutics for critical care conditions, has recently made significant progress through its latest fundraising endeavors in Chicago. The company, which aims to revolutionize healthcare through integrated solutions, unveiled two key announcements on January 29, 2026. This successful round of funding is set to accelerate innovation in the field, with a focus on developing advanced diagnostics and therapies to address critical care needs. Keep an eye on Prenosis as they continue to drive forward in this essential sector.

data.title: Integrity teams up with The Disruption Group to enhance services and drive growth. Supports agents with innovative technology.
data.description: Integrity, LLC ("Integrity"), a prominent distributor of life and health insurance, is enhancing the mission of a life-focused agency by providing cutting-edge technology, resources, and support. This collaboration aims to assist agents in building successful careers centered on service. The move was announced on January 29, 2026, at Dallas.

data.title: Pyse and MANTRA Finance get VARA NOC in Dubai to launch Shariah-compliant RWA backed by food delivery EVs.
data.description: In a recent development on January 29, 2026, Pyse has been granted the necessary Non-Objection Certificate (NOC) from Dubai's Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) to launch PYSE Green Velocity 1. This token has been specifically created to divide lease-based cash flows from electric assets. The approval from VARA allows for the distribution of this token in both Dubai, UAE, and Hong Kong. This signifies a key step for Pyse in expanding its operations and offerings in the digital assets space.
